index.title: Music Research - Please use your invitation
index.heading: Music Research - Please use your invitation
index.bodyLine1: This server is not intended for public access.
index.bodyLine2: Please use your invitation link to access the audio rating interface if you are a participant in one of our studies.

study.mobileWarningBanner: It looks like you are using a mobile device. We strongly recommend completing this study on a desktop or laptop computer, using headphones, in a quiet environment with enough uninterrupted time to focus.
study.instructionsBanner: Usage Instructions Reminder: Select a song and dimension to rate. Start by listening to the song. You can navigate in the audio and listen to individual sections as needed. Then double-click on the timeline to split the audio into segments you want to rate. For each segment, drag the rating line up or down to assign a rating. You can submit the study once you have rated all dimensions for all songs.

backendStatus.saveToServer: Ratings will be saved to server

study.offlineNotice: ⚠️ Offline Mode: Backend server not available. Ratings will be saved locally only.
study.title: Audio Rating Study
study.welcomePrefix: Welcome to our music perception study:
study.ratePrompt: For this study, you will be asked to rate {{songs}} songs on {{dimensions}} different dimensions.

usageList.listen: Listen to the audio and rate it as you go
usageList.split: Split the song into segments by double-clicking on the waveform
usageList.dragValues: Drag vertically within segments to adjust ratings
usageList.dragBoundaries: Drag segment boundaries horizontally to adjust timing

study.beginHint: Click "Begin Study" when you're ready to start.
study.submitStudyConfirm: Are you sure you want to submit all ratings for this study?
study.completionInitial: Complete and save all songs to submit study
study.thanksPrefix: Thanks for participating in our study
study.completionMessage: You have completely rated all {{songs}} songs in this study on {{dimensions}} dimensions.
study.resultsSaved: Your results have been saved. You can now close this browser tab.
study.saveFileHint: Save this file to preserve your ratings.
study.ratingLoadingError: Error loading song "{{song}}" from file "{{url}}". Please try again.

syncStatus.ready: Fully rated and ready to submit

studyStatus.allSaved: All songs saved! Ready to submit study.

study.offlineCompletion:
You have completed all songs in this study.
Important: Your ratings are saved locally only.

messages.warningSongNotAccessible: Warning: Song "{{song}}" is not accessible at URL "{{url}}". Please check the URL or try again later.
messages.warningSongFetchFailed: Warning: Failed to access song "{{song}}" at URL "{{url}}". Please check the URL or your network connection.
messages.genericTechnicalDifficulties: We are experiencing technical difficulties, please try again later.
messages.noRatingsToSave: No ratings to save. Please rate the song first.
messages.completeBeforeSubmit: Please complete all ratings before submitting.

errors.backendUnexpectedStatus: Backend is not available, unexpected status code.
errors.backendRequestFailed: Backend is not available, request failed.
errors.accessDeniedConfig:
Error: Access denied.

You do not have permission to access this study on this server.

Please use the invitation link from your email and access the study within the timeframe stated in the invitation.
errors.configNotFound:
Error: Study not available.

The requested study was not found on this server. It may no longer exist or the access period may have ended.

Please use the invitation link from your email and access the study within the timeframe stated in the invitation.
errors.backend403: Access denied. You may not have permission to access this information.
errors.backend404: Element not found. Could not find the requested resource on the server.
errors.backend500: Backend application error. The server encountered an error while processing your request.
errors.backendFetch: Backend error or backend not available. You can only save ratings locally for debug purposes, but they will not be saved to the server.
errors.backendUnknown: Unspecified backend error. You can only save ratings locally for debug purposes, but they will not be saved to the server.

widget.title: Please rate this song
widget.ratingControls: Rating Controls: Please split the audio into segments and rate each segment. Double-click on the waveform to split a segment. Drag inside a segment vertically to change its rating. Drag segment boundaries horizontally to move them. Right-click a segment boundary to delete it.
widget.audioControls: Audio Controls: Click the buttons below or press Space to toggle Play/Pause. Press Backspace to stop and return to the start. Click or drag the slider below to seek.
widget.segmentBorderTooltipLine2: drag to move, right-click to delete
